generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Some politicians talk about 'burden-sharing' like it's a bad thing - but real security comes from standing together. Cutting commitments doesn't make us stronger, it just leaves us vulnerable. Our allies need to see we're reliable partners. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
